---
title: "Program of Study"
---

I'm a Senior at BYU-Idaho with an expected graduation date of July, 2020. I am studing to get my Bachelors of Science in Software Engineering with an Emphasis in Embedded Systems. I am minoring in Computer Engineering and working on Data Science certification.  

## Software Engineering Core

* Intro to Software Development using C++
* Object-Oriented Development using C++
* Object-Oriented Programming with Data Structures using Python
* Software Design and Development using Java
  + Mobile App Development using Android Studio
  + Version Control Github --- Team work
* Project Management
  + Agile, Scrum and Waterfall
* System Security 
* Web Design & Development
* Introduction to Databases

### Math Core 

* PreCalculus
* Calculus 1
* Linear Algebra 
* Discrete Math 

### Embedded Systems Emphasis

* Fundamentals of Digital Systems
* Microprocessor Based-System Design
* Computer Architecture
* Embedded Systems

## Computer Engineering Minor

* Electric Circuit Analysis I
* Electronic Devices and Circuits
* Fundamentals of Digital Systems
* Digital Systems Lab
* Digital Systems Design
* Microprocessor System Design
* Computer Architecture
* Embedded Systems
* Advanced Embedded Systems

## Data Science Certificate

* Introduction to Programming using Python
* Object-Oriented Programming with Data Structures using Python
* Introduction to Databases
* Database Design and Development
* Data Intuition and Insight
* Data Wrangling and Visualization
